title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
description:
A.I. Artificial Intelligence

Processes of artificial intelligence integrate machine learning methods that contain complex, interconnected internal information structures (input layer, hidden layer[s], output layer). These hierarchically linked processes of information processing make it difficult for humans to understand cause-and-effect relationships.

The AI-technologies affect not only workflows, social media, remote work, computer games, and digital dependencies, but also increasingly generate fears, loneliness, the loss of a clear sense of self-worth, and the feeling of being disconnected from societal developments.

Added to this is the sense of passively facing an industrial complex that is redefining our society. AI technologies are directly intervening in our daily lives, influencing human cognitive abilities, the fabric of society, and the future of work.

I am using A.I. Artificial Intelligence in my work since 2023.
